tools.name: mofa_video
tools.description: Generate animated video cards using Gemini image generation and Veo image-to-video. Phase 1: Generate still images in parallel. Phase 2: Animate each image with Gemini Veo (sequential, rate-limited). Phase 3: Composite all clips with ffmpeg and optional background music into a final MP4.

cards.description: Array of video card objects to generate

name.description: Card identifier used for output filenames (e.g. card-01)

prompt.description: Image content description for Gemini image generation

style.description: Image style variant (e.g. front). Defaults to style's default variant.

anim_style.description: Animation style variant override for this card (shuimo, festive, gentle, dynamic)

anim_desc.description: Additional description appended to the animation prompt

card_dir.description: Working directory for generated PNG images and MP4 videos. Must be unique per request (e.g. /tmp/mofa-video-20260315-143022).

style.description: Image style template name from styles/ directory (default: video-card)

anim_style.description: Animation variant applied to all cards. video-card style: shuimo (ink wash), festive (Chinese painting), gentle (dreamy), dynamic (energetic). social-story style: anim_minimal, anim_bold, anim_cinematic. product-reel style: anim_tech, anim_lifestyle, anim_luxury. Default: shuimo

aspect.description: Aspect ratio for generated images (default: 9:16 for vertical video)

image_size.description: Image resolution: 1K, 2K, or 4K. Higher quality is slower.

concurrency.description: Number of parallel workers for Phase 1 image generation (default: 3). Veo animation in Phase 2 is always sequential.

still_duration.description: Duration in seconds of the still image shown before animation begins (default: 2.0)

crossfade_dur.description: Duration in seconds of the crossfade transition between cards (default: 1.0)

fade_out_dur.description: Duration in seconds of the final fade-out (default: 1.5)

music_volume.description: Background music volume from 0.0 (silent) to 1.0 (full). Default: 0.3

music_fade_in.description: Duration in seconds for background music fade-in (default: 2.0)

bgm.description: Path to background music file (MP3/WAV). Optional. No BGM if omitted.

api.description: API mode for image generation: rt (realtime, fast) or batch (50% cheaper, async 5-30 min). Veo always uses realtime.
